{{Quote|We have been negotiating with ''Overlord Ghorin'', ruler of the ''Greater Plooriod Cluster''. The ''Plooriods'' contain several agricultural worlds that are major grain exporters.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] briefing|<ref name="Imperial Pursuit 8A" />}}
The '''Greater Plooriod Cluster''', also known as the '''Plooriods''', was a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] located within the [[Greater Plooriod sector/Legends|Greater Plooriod]] and [[Ploo sector/Legends|Ploo]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]], in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
The Plooriods contained many [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural worlds]] that supplied [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It also included the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corsin/Legends|Corsin]], where [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|races]] took place.

The Greater Plooriod Cluster was ruled by [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]], who shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], agreed to supply the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] with [[Grain/Legends|grain]]. The grain had been tainted.

Following the [[Disaster at Deepspace Besh|disaster]] at [[Tingel Deepspace Besh|Deepspace Besh]], the Rebel Alliance stepped up raids and military action in an effort to keep the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] off balance. As part of this strategy, the Rebel Alliance launched several raids in the Plooriods, including [[Raid in the Corsin system|one]] in the [[Corsin system/Legends|Corsin system]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Sec-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', indicated in [[June]] [[2015]] that the Greater Plooriod Cluster was excluded from [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] because it was a geographic feature bigger than a [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="Email">{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2015-06-30}}</ref>
